creator: ssedov@mbsd.msk.ru
text:
- Most ruby ports obtain information about prefix from rbconfig.rb. Patch
it to return patch with correct PREFIX if PREFIX was specifies in enviropment.
It will not interfere with current ruby ports as all of them gets installed
into LOCALBASE currently by default (and none of them are PREFIX-clean).
- Bump-up PORTREVISION

this PR depends on ports/102648
